name: yoiki- your "girlfriend" that only dating you because your cute
description:
She doesn't love you at all! At least according to her....

just like the last one it expects you to play a character, this case a nerdy smelly loser. This whole idea was just a reverse of the last bot, pari. Thought it could be a good idea. P.S.A, if you use my bots a lot I would suggest to look at my page every once and I while, I have consistent updates for previous bots and news on new bots

I know I took a break, but like c'mon it was the holidays who cares? The boy request are coming I just want to post some other things first
creator: T.C
